recommendations.title: The Adventure of Sherlock Holmes' Smarter Brother
recommendations.overview: After spending decades living in the shadow of his more famous and successful sibling, Consulting Detective Sigerson Holmes (Wilder) is called upon to help solve a crucial case that leads him on a hilarious trail of false identities, stolen documents

recommendations.title: Haunted Honeymoon
recommendations.overview: Radio personalities Larry Abbot and Vickie Pearle are stars of a mystery show. Since they announced their engagement, Larry has been plagued by speech problems and, seeking out an unconventional cure, he returns to his boyhood home, a mansion in the

recommendations.title: Anaïs in Love
recommendations.overview: A young woman struggling to stay on top of everything in her life meets a married publisher and begins an affair with him.

recommendations.title: Bonnie and Clyde
recommendations.overview: In the 1930s, bored European-American waitress Bonnie Parker falls in love with a European-American ex-con named Clyde Barrow and together they start a violent crime spree through the country, stealing cars and robbing banks.

recommendations.title: The Man Who Copied
recommendations.overview: A young photocopier operator becomes infatuated with his neighbor and, unable to afford anything from her shop, turns to shady schemes to make money.

recommendations.title: The Red Thread
recommendations.overview: Seven years after their first infatuated encounter, Abril and Manuel meet again. Despite the fact that they are both married, it is soon apparent that their attraction has only grown.

recommendations.title: Red Shoes and the Seven Dwarfs
recommendations.genres: Animation, Fantasy, Family, Comedy, Romance, Adventure
recommendations.overview: Princes who have been turned into Dwarfs seek the red shoes of a lady in order to break the spell, although it will not be easy.

recommendations.title: Divorce Italian Style
recommendations.overview: Ferdinando Cefalù is desperate to marry his cousin, Angela, but he is married to Rosalia and divorce is illegal in Italy. To get around the law, he tries to trick his wife into having an affair so he can catch her and murder her, as he knows he would

recommendations.title: Pardon Mon Affaire
recommendations.overview: On an otherwise normal day, Étienne, a happily married man and a good father, sees something that stops him dead in his tracks: a gorgeous woman in a billowing red dress. Long after she has left his vision, her memory continues to haunt his mind. He

recommendations.title: 5 to 7
recommendations.overview: A young writer begins an affair with an older woman from France whose open marriage to a diplomat dictates that they can meet only between the hours of 5 p.m. to 7 p.m.
